1.arabic: بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم اقرأ باسم ربك الذي خلق
1.english: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -
1.transliteration: Iqra bismi rab bikal lazee khalaq

1.english: Created man from a clinging substance.
Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -
Taught man that which he knew not.
Indeed, to your Lord is the return.
Have you seen the one who forbids
Have you seen if he is upon guidance
Have you seen if he denies and turns away -
1.transliteration: Ara-aita in kaz zaba wa ta walla

1.english: Does he not know that Allah sees?
1.transliteration: Alam y'alam bi-an nal lahaa yaraa

1.arabic: كلا لئن لم ينته لنسفعا بالناصية
1.english: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock -
1.transliteration: Kalla la illam yantahi la nasfa'am bin nasiyah

1.english: Then let him call his associates;
We will call the angels of Hell.
No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah].
